purpose: Workspace persistent storage backup, restore-to-new-Workspace, and retention contract.
machineBoundary: VolumeSnapshot backup/restore behavior, retention deletion scope, API shape, and commercial billing rules.

lifecycle.removalCondition: Replace only with a newer current contract for the same boundary.

currentScope: Workspace persistent storage backup, restore, and retention

resourceModel.source: TKE PVC backed by Tencent CBS

commercialRules: Restored Workspaces are new billable Workspaces.
Restored Workspaces must freeze seven days of compute and storage before creation.
Restored Workspaces charge the first hour immediately.
Storage backup metadata must not contain Workspace access tokens.
nonGoals: in-place restore over an existing PVC
